title: my makeup routine for date night! | GET READY WITH ME

questions.question: What does 'concealer' refer to in this makeup context?
options: A) A product for making lips fuller
B) A product for covering imperfections on skin
C) A product for coloring cheeks
D) A product for removing makeup
questions.explanation: 在美妆语境中，concealer（遮瑕膏）是一种用于遮盖皮肤瑕疵、斑点、黑眼圈的化妆品。视频中多次提到使用concealer来遮盖需要遮盖的部位。

questions.question: What does 'highlight' mean in this video?
options: A) Adding light colors to make certain face areas appear more prominent
B) Removing dark spots on the skin
D) Making the face look smaller
questions.explanation: 在美妆中，highlight（高光）是指在面部特定位置（如颧骨、鼻梁）使用带闪的产品，使这些部位看起来更加立体、突出。视频中提到用高光stick来提亮面部。

questions.question: What does the phrase 'GET READY WITH ME' imply in this video title?
options: A) The creator will help viewers get dressed
B) The creator will show her makeup process while viewers watch
C) The creator is going on a date
D) The creator is teaching viewers how to cook
questions.explanation: 'Get Ready With Me'是YouTube美妆视频的常见标题，意思是创作者在化妆/准备的过程中拍摄视频，让观众跟着一起看，就像一起做准备一样。

questions.question: What was the FIRST product the creator used in this video?
options: C) Skin prep product (peptide glazing fluid)
questions.explanation: 视频开头，Haley首先使用了road peptide glazing fluid进行皮肤准备（skin prep），然后才开始化妆。

questions.question: What does 'blender' refer to in makeup context?
options: B) A makeup tool for blending products
questions.explanation: 在美妆中，blender（美妆蛋）是一种用于晕染和混合化妆品（如遮瑕、粉底）的工具。视频中多次提到使用beauty blender来推开和定妆产品。

questions.question: What does 'glowy' mean when describing skin or makeup?
options: B) Healthy-looking with a subtle shine
questions.explanation: 'Glowy'形容皮肤或妆容看起来健康、有光泽但不是油腻的亮泽感。视频中描述最终妆容是'glowy and dewy'，意思是健康有光泽的。

questions.question: Which blush product did the creator use in this video?
options: B) Westmin Atelier Solar Tint Blush Duo
questions.explanation: 视频中明确提到使用了'semi Haze solar tint blush duo'，这是一款腮红产品，Haley表示她很喜欢这个颜色的腮红。

questions.question: What does 'buildable' mean when describing concealer?
options: A) Cannot be changed once applied
B) Can be layered to increase coverage as needed
D) Lasts for a long time
questions.explanation: 'Buildable'指的是产品可以层层叠加，根据需要增加遮盖度。视频中提到concealer是buildable的，意思是可以在需要更多遮盖的地方多涂几层。

questions.question: What is the 'Marc Jacobs Spotlight Glow Stick' used for?
questions.explanation: 视频中提到使用Marc Jacobs的高光棒（glow stick）来提亮面部的高光区域，这是用于增加面部立体感的产品。

questions.question: What does 'seal in' mean in the makeup context?
options: B) Lock in the makeup product to make it last longer
questions.explanation: 'Seal in'在美妆中指的是通过定妆产品（如散粉）来锁住之前涂抹的化妆品，使其更持久。视频中提到用粉来'seal in'遮瑕。

questions.question: What is the final lip product mentioned at the end of the video?
options: C) Salted caramel peptide lip treatment
questions.explanation: 视频最后，Haley提到使用了'salted caramel peptide lip treatment'（咸焦糖肽唇部护理产品）来护理嘴唇。

questions.question: What does 'dewy' describe in makeup finish?
questions.explanation: 'Dewy'描述的是一种水润、清新的妆容效果，看起来像皮肤自带光泽感。视频中描述最终效果是'glowy and dewy'。

questions.question: What is the LAST step in this makeup routine according to the video?
questions.explanation: 视频中提到最后一个步骤是用粉来定妆（seal in the concealer with powder），这是妆容的最后一步。

questions.question: What does 'monochromatic look' mean in this context?
options: B) Using the same color family on different face areas
C) A very dramatic makeup look
questions.explanation: 'Monochromatic'指的是单色系妆容，即在脸颊、眼部、嘴唇等部位使用同一色系的产品。视频中提到'like the same thing on the cheek on the lid on the lip'。

questions.question: What does 'bronze up' mean in the makeup context?
options: A) Make the face look darker/tanned
C) Add white color to face
questions.explanation: 'Bronze up'指的是使用古铜色或深色化妆品来模拟晒黑的效果，增加面部轮廓感。视频中提到用高光棒来bronze up the face。

questions.question: Why does the creator say her face is 'always much more pale than my body'?
options: A) She has a skin disease
B) She keeps her face out of the sun
C) She uses too much concealer
questions.explanation: Haley解释说她face比身体pale是因为'she keeps her face out of the sun'（她不让脸晒太阳），这是因为日常护肤保护。

questions.question: What does 'shade' refer to in 'using the shade 11c'?
options: A) The price of the product
B) The color variant of the product
C) The size of the product
questions.explanation: 在美妆产品中，'shade'指的是化妆品的色号。视频中提到使用'shade 11c'的concealer，这是该产品的特定颜色编号。

questions.question: What is the purpose of using 'peptide glazing fluid' according to the video?
options: B) To prep the skin before makeup
questions.explanation: 视频开始时，Haley使用peptide glazing fluid进行'skin prep'（皮肤准备），这是用在化妆品之前的基础护肤步骤。

questions.question: What is the overall style of the final makeup look described in the video?
questions.explanation: 视频结束时，Haley总结说这是'super minimal easy chill'的妆容风格，意思是简约、轻松自然的日常妆容。

questions.question: Please describe the sequence of makeup steps shown in this video in your own words.
questions.explanation: 这是一道口语表达题，要求考生用自己的话描述视频中的化妆步骤顺序。
questions.referenceAnswer: Key points: 1) Skin prep with peptide glazing fluid 2) Concealer application 3) Blush on cheeks 4) Highlighter on face points 5) Mascara 6) Lip treatment 7) Powder to seal in
questions.hint: Try to mention at least 5 main steps in logical order

questions.question: What is your favorite makeup product mentioned in the video and why? Please explain in English.
questions.explanation: 这是一道口语表达题，要求考生讨论视频中提到的喜欢的美妆产品并解释原因。
questions.referenceAnswer: Should mention specific product names and give personal reasons (e.g., glow stick, concealer, blush duo, lip treatment)
questions.hint: You can choose any product mentioned and explain why you like it

questions.question: How would you describe a 'glowy and dewy' makeup finish to someone who doesn't know about makeup?
questions.explanation: 这是一道口语表达题，要求考生向不懂美妆的人解释什么是'glowy and dewy'的妆容效果。
questions.referenceAnswer: Should describe it as healthy-looking skin with natural shine, like skin has moisture and light reflecting from it, not oily but fresh and radiant
questions.hint: Use simple comparisons like 'like morning dew' or 'healthy skin that looks hydrated'

questions.question: Why does the creator apply concealer 'two or three times' in certain areas?
options: A) The product is low quality
B) To build up coverage where needed
C) She forgot to apply it the first time
D) The product dried too quickly
questions.explanation: 因为之前提到concealer是'buildable'的，所以可以在需要更多遮盖的地方多涂几层来增加遮盖度。

questions.question: What did the creator use to cover 'little dark marks' on her face?
options: B) Concealer with a specific trick
questions.explanation: 视频中提到她用concealer来遮盖little dark marks，并提到会使用一个小技巧（little trick）来处理这些斑点。
